cursor.description: `next_cursor` from the previous call. Omit on the first read; pass it back to summarize only what's new.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this agent application.

max_chars.description: Digest character budget (default 4000, range 1–20000). The digest is clipped to fit and `truncated` is set.

session_id.description: Session to read (must belong to this agent).
